step.name: author-message-schema
step.action: Define schema with version, idempotency_key, payload, produced_at. Document field rules.

step.name: build-producer
step.action: Producer assigns idempotency_key and version. Uses the outbox pattern when message must be paired with a local transaction.

step.name: build-consumer
step.action: Consumer reads, checks idempotency, processes, then acks. Crash before ack = redeliver. Crash after ack = work was committed.
step.decision-gate: If a consumer needs to emit downstream messages, route them through the outbox in the same transaction.

step.name: wire-dlq-and-retries
step.action: Configure max_retries with exponential backoff + jitter. Route exhausted to DLQ. Document the policy.

step.name: wire-alerts
step.action: Add monitor for DLQ depth + growth rate. Alert on threshold to PagerDuty/Slack.
